ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of incident reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "reported_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the incident */,
  "assigned_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to handle the incident */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_summary" TEXT /* Summary of how the incident was resolved */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the incident details can be made public */,
  "media_coverage" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the incident has been covered by the media */,
  "public_statement" TEXT /* Public statement related to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_assigned_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_reported_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the report type */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the report type */,
  "require_property" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if property information is required */,
  "require_vehicle" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if vehicle information is required */,
  "require_media" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if media information is required */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report type */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the report type */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Default priority level for incidents of this type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Default severity level for incidents of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the location is situated */,
  "district" TEXT /* Police district where the location is situated */,
  "is_high_crime_area" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the location is in a high-crime area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the property is involved in */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, car, electronics) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the property */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the property */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., new, used, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the vehicle is involved in */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "insurance_company" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "is_stolen" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the vehicle is stolen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the media file is related to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the media file (for videos) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the media file (for photos and videos) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the media file is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, detective, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the note is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date and time the note was added */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the note is confidential */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the note (e.g., public, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_notes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the suspect is involved in */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "suspect_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the suspect */,
  "suspect_address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  "suspect_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the suspect */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the suspect */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the suspect */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the suspect */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color of the suspect */,
  "tattoos" TEXT /* Tattoos of the suspect */,
  "scars" TEXT /* Scars or marks of the suspect */,
  "is_wanted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the suspect is wanted by law enforcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspects_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the status change is related to */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the incident */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time the status was changed */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the status change was internal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_status_history_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_status_history_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "incident_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first incident in the link */,
  "incident_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second incident in the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., related, follow-up) */,
  "link_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the link */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the link between incidents is confirmed */,
  "confirmation_date" TEXT /* Date the link was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_links_incident_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id_2") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_links_incident_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id_1") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
